title: Copied Task to new board, and subitems disappeared
excerpt: I copied a task to a new board, and in the process the subitems were lost. Is this expected behavior? Is there anyway to recover the subitems? Right now we have these “ghost” subitems that people are replying to via emai…

posts.author: AZQA (Justin)
posts.cookedHtml: I copied a task to a new board, and in the process the subitems were lost. Is this expected behavior? Is there anyway to recover the subitems? Right now we have these “ghost” subitems that people are replying to via email, but that don’t seem to exist on the board.
